scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:staging: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend:staging" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run preview:frontend"
